scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @typsy/shared build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @typsy/shared dev" "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.dev:synth: pnpm --filter @typsy/shared build && pnpm --filter server seed:dev && TYPSY_DATA_MODE=synthetic concurrently "pnpm --filter @typsy/shared dev" "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
